email_subject: Application for Customer Service Officer – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at Synergie Beveren, as advertised on VDAB. With a strong background in administration, organization, and client communication, I am confident I can contribute effectively to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client accounts, coordinate with stakeholders, and ensure timely delivery of projects. I am accustomed to working accurately under deadlines and maintaining clear communication with clients and team members. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie has honed my ability to work efficiently in fast-paced environments, while my technical skills in Excel and data tracking support administrative tasks.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I hold a valid driver's license and am flexible to work between 7 and 19h as required.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at Synergie Beveren. With a strong foundation in administration, client communication, and organizational tasks, I am eager to bring my skills to your team and contribute to the smooth management of transport orders, driver schedules, and supplier contacts.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client projects simultaneously, ensuring accurate execution and timely delivery. I coordinate with clients and internal teams, track performance metrics, and maintain detailed records—skills directly transferable to the administrative and organizational demands of this role. My previous experience in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie taught me to work efficiently in a high-volume environment, maintaining accuracy and attention to detail.

I am proficient in MS Excel and comfortable with data entry and reporting. I communicate fluently in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I hold a valid driver's license and am flexible to work between 7 and 19h as required.

What draws me to this position is the variety it offers—combining customer contact, planning, and administrative coordination. I thrive in dynamic settings where I can use my organizational skills to support operations and ensure customer satisfaction.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your needs. Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Strong administrative and organizational skills, with experience managing multiple client accounts and coordinating tasks.
Proficient in MS Excel and data tracking, used for performance reporting and monitoring.
Excellent communication skills in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.
Flexible and adaptable, with experience in fast-paced logistics and remote team coordination.
Valid driver's license and availability for flexible day hours between 7 and 19h.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with strong administrative and organizational skills, experienced in client communication, data management, and coordinating tasks in fast-paced environments. At Episto, I manage multiple client accounts, track performance metrics, and ensure accurate project delivery. My background in logistics has honed my ability to work efficiently under pressure while maintaining attention to detail. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, I hold a valid driver's license and am flexible to work between 7 and 19h.

CORE SKILLS
- Administrative & organizational: data entry, record keeping, scheduling, coordination
- Client communication: professional email and phone correspondence, stakeholder management
- MS Excel: data tracking, reporting, analysis
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
